form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after six months favourite; won by 3 len at this track March 23 over 1500m defeating Oasis Breeze carrying 57kg at $1.70. Previously second-up 4th of 12 at this track on October 2 over 1400m, 5 len behind Wow Wow Wow with 57kg at $2.50. Great chance to make it two in a row. Improver with winning prospects.
